title: miconia cabraliensis
intro: Miconia cabraliensis, also known as the "Brazilian mint," is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Miconia cabraliensis include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and soothing of skin irritations, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Miconia cabraliensis typically involve infusion of the leaves in hot water to create a tea or infusion, which can be consumed as a remedy for various health conditions.
